description: A relation linking a file to a business entity (e.g., message, invoice, appointment).

uid.description: Unique identifier of the relation record (e.g., "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901").

file_uid.description: Unique identifier of the linked file (e.g., "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890").

entity_type.description: Type of the entity the file is linked to (e.g., "invoice", "appointment").

entity_uid.description: Unique identifier of the linked entity (e.g., "inv-abc123xyz").

business_uid.description: Unique identifier of the business that owns this relation (e.g., "024bl3kv7jf8cu4u").

client_uid.description: Unique identifier of the client associated with this relation, if any (e.g., "cli-xyz789abc" or null).

file.description: Embedded file details. Returned only on GET /v3/assets/file_entities.

url.description: Pre-signed S3 download URL, valid 10 minutes (e.g., "https://s3.amazonaws.com/...").

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached at upload time (e.g., {"source": "portal"}).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was created (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z").

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was last updated (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:35:00Z").

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the relation was created (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z").

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the relation was last updated (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:35:00Z").
